home.title: PDFChill — Free, private, in-browser PDF editor
home.description: Free, private PDF editor that runs entirely in your browser. Merge, split, rotate, delete, reorder and compress PDFs — your files never leave your device.

merge.heading: Merge PDF files
merge.title: Merge PDF files — free, private, in your browser | PDFChill
merge.description: Combine several PDFs into one file, in the order you choose. Free, no sign-up, and nothing is uploaded — the merging happens on your own device.

split.heading: Split PDF
split.title: Split PDF — separate pages or page ranges | PDFChill
split.description: Cut one PDF into separate files or page ranges and download them together as a zip. Free, no sign-up, and your file never leaves your browser.

compress.heading: Compress PDF
compress.title: Compress PDF — make a PDF smaller | PDFChill
compress.description: Shrink a PDF by recompressing the images inside it, with a quality level you choose. See the before and after size, and never get a bigger file back. Runs entirely in your browser.

imagesToPdf.heading: Images to PDF
imagesToPdf.title: Images to PDF — convert JPG and PNG to PDF | PDFChill
imagesToPdf.description: Turn JPG and PNG images into a PDF. Reorder and rotate them first, pick a page size and margin, and get one PDF or one per image. Free, and nothing is uploaded.
